industry: Managed IT Services / Cloud Transformation / Cybersecurity
website_note: infoaxis.com remains accessible; company was acquired by Atlantic, Tomorrow's Office in September 2024. Site may redirect to Atlantic's website going forward.
description: InfoAxis Inc. was a managed services, cloud transformation, and cybersecurity provider based in Mahwah, NJ, serving large and small healthcare, financial services, legal, manufacturing, and construction firms in Bergen County, NJ for over 25 years — until its acquisition by Atlantic, Tomorrow's Office in September 2024.
recent_news: On September 12, 2024, Atlantic, Tomorrow's Office acquired InfoAxis Inc. — the 15th acquisition for Atlantic. Mickey McGraw's team was noted for organic growth and client-centered service philosophy. In July 2025, Atlantic announced executive succession with Jason Weiss as CEO and Adam Weiss as President, with Larry Weiss moving to Chairman.
verification_notes: Mickey McGraw confirmed as Co-founder and CEO of InfoAxis. Company founded in 1999; operated for 25 years before acquisition. Contact and title verified through acquisition press release and multiple sources.
enrichment_notes: Major news: Company was acquired in September 2024 — significant event for any lead data. InfoAxis is now part of Atlantic, Tomorrow's Office. Original contact (McGraw) likely transitioned post-acquisition. Lead data should be updated to reflect acquired status.

company_name: Steven W. Smith DDS PLLC (Smith Family and Cosmetic Dentistry)
website_note: yourcarolinadentist.com confirmed active as Smith Family and Cosmetic Dentistry, Dr. Steven W. Smith DDS PLLC. Operating brand is 'Smith Family and Cosmetic Dentistry'.
description: Steven W. Smith DDS PLLC, operating as Smith Family and Cosmetic Dentistry, is a multi-location dental practice in coastal North Carolina offering comprehensive family and cosmetic dentistry including dental implants, orthodontics, cosmetic dentistry, TMD treatment, and sleep apnea services, with locations in Sneads Ferry, Jacksonville, Hampstead, Surf City, Goldsboro, and Wilmington.

contacts.name: Kenna Smith
contacts.title: Partner (wife of Dr. Steven W. Smith; listed as partner in practice directories)

recent_news: Practice has expanded to 7 locations across coastal NC including Sneads Ferry, Jacksonville, Hampstead, Surf City, Wilmington (Market Street), Wilmington (Carolina Beach Rd), and Goldsboro. No specific 2024-2025 expansion announcements found; the multi-location network is established and active.
verification_notes: Kenna Smith confirmed as Dr. Smith's wife and practice partner per about page and Yahoo Local directory. Dr. Steven W. Smith confirmed: DDS from University of Michigan 2009, 4 years as Navy dentist, practice opened in Sneads Ferry, NC. Both contacts verified. Note: 'partner' is a business partnership role, not dental partner.
enrichment_notes: Practice operating brand is 'Smith Family and Cosmetic Dentistry'. DDS education from Univ of Michigan, class of 2009. Navy dentist background. 7 active NC locations. Second entry in batch (entry 15) is a duplicate with no contact listed.

industry: IT Staffing / Software Development / IT Consulting
website_note: galaxesystems.com confirmed active as the Galax-eSystems Corporation website (Pittsburgh, PA).
description: Galax-eSystems Corporation (GES) is a full-service IT consulting and staffing firm based in Pittsburgh, PA, specializing in IT staffing, enterprise application development, system integration, ERP solutions, business process re-engineering, business intelligence, and infrastructure support for clients in healthcare, education, government, energy, and commercial sectors across the United States.
recent_news: Annual revenue was $9M in 2025. In FY2025, GalaxEsystems filed 22 Form I-129 H-1B petitions (22 approved, 0 denied), indicating active IT staffing operations. Company continues to focus on IT staffing and consulting across multiple US industries. No major acquisitions or expansions found in 2024-2025.
verification_notes: Revathi Annamreddy confirmed as CEO/President of Galax-eSystems on Crunchbase and ZoomInfo. Company address confirmed as One Oxford Centre, 301 Grant Street, Pittsburgh PA 15219. Title listed as 'President' in original record; confirmed she holds both President and CEO titles.
enrichment_notes: Small IT staffing firm (~20 employees, ~$9M revenue). Primarily an H-1B employer for IT staffing placements. Has India subsidiary (Galax-Esystems Corp India Private Limited). Limited public executive data beyond the founder/CEO.

description: Kentucky Country Day School (KCD) is a private, coeducational JK-12 independent day school located on an 80+ acre campus in Louisville, KY. The school emphasizes the values in its motto: Citizen, Scholar, Steward. It is accredited and serves students from Junior Kindergarten through 12th grade.

recent_news: Awarded $846,790 WisDOT contract in May 2024 for rehabilitation of bridge on WIS 35 over Big River in Pierce County. Active bidder on multiple WisDOT 2024-2026 projects including 2026 Walworth County bridge award.

enrichment_notes: Third-generation family business. Founded 1952 (corrected from 1950 in source data). Ryan Pheifer is sole owner and President. WisDOT Structure of the Year award recipient. Located in Neenah, WI.

company_name: HEALTHY MOTHERS/HEALTHY BABIES COALITION OF PALM BEACH COUNTY, INC.
website_note: Active site confirmed at hmhbpbc.org with full service information and leadership pages.
description: Healthy Mothers, Healthy Babies Coalition of Palm Beach County, Inc. is a nonprofit organization based in West Palm Beach, Florida, founded in 1986, dedicated to improving birth outcomes through equitable delivery of early prenatal care, education, and support for pregnant women. Services include CenteringPregnancy®, doula services, breastfeeding support, emergency pantry, and educational classes. Annual budget exceeds $4M; team of 60.
recent_news: March 2026: Michelle Gonzalez commented on organization's sixth annual Baskets4Babies crowdfunding campaign. August 2025: Gonzalez named finalist for 34th Annual ATHENA Leadership Awards. 2024: Finalist in Palm Beach Post Community's Choice Awards.
verification_notes: Michelle Gonzalez confirmed as CEO since 2016 from LinkedIn, organization website, Nonprofit Chamber of Palm Beach County, and ZoomInfo. Activity confirmed as recently as March 2026. Phone: 561-665-4500. EIN: 59-2657051.
enrichment_notes: Strong nonprofit with clear public leadership. Michelle Gonzalez has 25+ years nonprofit experience. Annual budget $4M+, team of 60. Only CenteringPregnancy® provider in Palm Beach County since 2008.

The practice employs board-certified nurse practitioners and case management specialists, utilizing a combination of remote patient monitoring technology, telemedicine, and in-home face-to-face visits for homebound patients.

website_note: Active site confirmed at aligneddc.com. Company brand is 'Aligned Data Centers' (formerly 'Aligned Energy'). VA designation refers to Northern Virginia campus operations (Ashburn and Sterling). HQ is Dallas, TX.
description: Aligned Data Centers (formerly Aligned Energy) is a leading provider of hyperscale, colocation, and build-to-scale data center solutions headquartered in Dallas, Texas, with major campuses in Northern Virginia (Ashburn and Sterling). Acquired by AIP, MGX, and BlackRock's GIP at ~$40 billion enterprise value (announced October 2025, expected close H1 2026). Provides adaptive AI-ready infrastructure featuring patented Delta Cube cooling technology. Portfolio: 50 campuses, 5+ GW capacity.

contacts.name: Matthew Chambliss
contacts.title: EVP, Commercial Strategy and Energy (appointed February 2025)

recent_news: March 2026: Closed $2.58 billion credit facility to fuel U.S. expansion. October 2025: AIP, MGX, and BlackRock's GIP announced acquisition at ~$40 billion enterprise value (close expected H1 2026). February 2025: Four new C-suite appointments (Morris, Welch, Clark, Chambliss). September 2024: Meghan Baivier appointed CFO; Anubhav Raj moved to CIO. 2024: Won Northern Virginia Tech Council Data Center Innovation Award.
verification_notes: Andrew Schaap confirmed as CEO from company website aligneddc.com/blog/team/andrew-schaap/, LinkedIn (linkedin.com/in/andrewschaap1), and multiple press sources. Confirmed continuing as CEO post-acquisition. February 2025 leadership team additions confirmed from company press release and GlobeNewswire. Employee count corrected from 8 (VA legal entity artifact) to ~450 (realistic for $40B enterprise). HQ is Dallas, TX — not VA.
enrichment_notes: Original employee count of 8 referred to the VA legal entity only; full company is ~450 employees. 'Aligned Energy Data Center' is the outdated name — current brand is 'Aligned Data Centers'. HQ: Dallas, TX. Northern Virginia campuses in Ashburn and Sterling.
